ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the track */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track (e.g., happy, sad) */,
  "tempo" TEXT /* Tempo of the track (e.g., fast, slow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for booking inquiries */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "album_cover" TEXT /* Album cover image */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre" TEXT /* Subgenre (e.g., hip hop, electronic dance music) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist that contains the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* User profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the listening event */,
  "playback_device" TEXT /* Device used to play the track (e.g., phone, computer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track being tracked */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the track has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date when the track was last played */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_performance_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, subscriber) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_reviews_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who follows the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
